# Pull Request Checklist

## What changed?
Briefly explain the contribution.

## Evidence
- [ ] Linked commit(s), issue, notebook, demo, screenshot, or test output
- [ ] Explained what this proves
- [ ] Explained what this does not prove

## Readiness
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check_repo.py` locally, or this PR only changes non-runtime text
- [ ] I followed the Code of Conduct
- [ ] I credited any external work or collaborators

## Witness Review
- [ ] Independent witness review is not needed
- [ ] Independent witness review is requested
- [ ] Independent witness review is attached or linked

---

**No commit. No claim. No receipt. No authority.**
